description: Binary checklist of Stainless platform features. Tracks what is implemented (true) vs not yet (false) for the $500/mo enterprise trial.

sdk-generation.description: Auto-generated type-safe SDKs from OpenAPI specs (Anthropic SDK is Stainless-generated)
sdk-generation.notes: @anthropic-ai/sdk ^0.78.0 consumed as dependency — this IS Stainless output

type-safety.description: Full TypeScript type definitions, discriminated unions, branded types
type-safety.notes: Using strict TypeScript mode, all types from @anthropic-ai/sdk

streaming-support.description: SSE and streaming response support for real-time output
streaming-support.notes: Available in SDK, not yet used in jade plugins

pagination-helpers.notes: Used in AdminApiClient for member/workspace listing

automatic-retries.description: Exponential backoff retry logic built into SDK
automatic-retries.notes: Default SDK behavior, used in all API calls

typed-errors.description: Typed error classes with HTTP status codes
typed-errors.notes: AdminApiError extends from SDK error types

webhook-verification.description: Webhook signature verification for incoming events
webhook-verification.notes: Not yet needed — no inbound webhooks in v1

multipart-uploads.notes: Not applicable to current plugin architecture

tree-shaking.notes: Package is type:module with ESM exports

prompt-caching.description: Cache breakpoints in messages for cost optimization
prompt-caching.notes: Available via SDK cache_control, not yet integrated

token-counting.notes: Endpoint available, not yet used in cost controls

changelog-automation.description: Automated CHANGELOG.md generation from conventional commits

semantic-versioning.description: Automated semver bumps based on commit types
semantic-versioning.notes: release-please handles version bumps in package.json

admin-api-integration.description: Anthropic Admin API for org/member/workspace/usage management

github-actions-integration.description: Claude Code GitHub Action for PR review and automation

cost-tracking-per-pr.description: Token usage and cost tracking posted to PRs
cost-tracking-per-pr.notes: GitHub Action workflow parses --output-format json for costUsd

manifest-update-on-commit.description: Auto-update dependency and feature manifests on each commit
manifest-update-on-commit.notes: manifest-update.yml GitHub Action runs on push to main

security-review.description: Claude security review features extended to test-driven planning
security-review.notes: SecurityCheckpoint enum + posture tracking in enterprise module

dependency-audit.description: Track all Claude security packages with health status and CVE cross-reference
dependency-audit.notes: TrackedDependency type + DependencyHealth enum + deps-update.yml workflow

silent-failure-prevention.description: Every error path has explicit handling — no swallowed errors
silent-failure-prevention.notes: SILENT_FAILURE_PREVENTION checkpoint in security posture, TestRationale.SILENT_FAILURE_GUARD

test-manifest-machine-readable.description: Test manifest with inline rationale, upstream/downstream deps, version-controlled

read-write-separation.description: Agent tool access governed with read and write always separated

team-governance.description: GitHub team-based permission governance with audit cadence

secret-rotation-tracking.description: Secret rotation policies with provider-specific backends
secret-rotation-tracking.notes: GovernedSecret type + SecretProvider enum (v1: GitHub, v2: cloud vaults)

intranet-dashboard.description: Vercel admin dashboard behind Cloudflare Access (intranet-only)

scim-provisioning.description: SCIM endpoint for automated user provisioning from IdP
scim-provisioning.notes: IdentityConfig type defines scimEndpoint, not yet connected

bedrock-vertex-support.description: AWS Bedrock and GCP Vertex as alternative cloud auth providers
bedrock-vertex-support.notes: CloudAuth type supports anthropic-direct, pro-max, aws-bedrock, gcp-vertex
